page: Microsoft Azure HB368-48rs_v5 is an x86_64 architecture server instance belonging to the HBv5 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 48 dedicated vCPUs powered by an Intel processor, paired with 448.0 GB of system memory. This configuration yields a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 9.33 GB per core.

The instance is equipped with 15851 GB of local storage and supports Premium Storage. It is RDMA (Remote Direct Memory Access) capable, which enables low-latency, high-throughput networking interfaces. No graphics processing units are included in this configuration.

With its high memory density and substantial local storage capacity, the instance offers qualitative cost efficiency for workloads requiring large datasets to be held in memory or local disk. The lack of GPU acceleration limits its applicability for deep learning training, but the combination of dedicated Intel vCPUs, RDMA networking, and high memory capacity makes it suitable for memory-intensive databases, large-scale simulations, and high-performance computing workloads.
description: Microsoft Azure HB368-48rs_v5 is an x86_64 architecture server instance within the HBv5 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 48 dedicated vCPUs powered by an Intel processor, 448.0 GB of memory, and 15851 GB of local storage. With a high memory-to-core ratio of 9.33 GB per vCPU, this instance is designed for memory-intensive applications. It is RDMA-capable and Premium Storage-capable, facilitating high-throughput, low-latency networking and storage operations. The server does not include GPU hardware. This configuration is optimized for workloads such as memory-intensive databases, high-performance computing simulations, and large-scale data processing tasks that benefit from substantial local storage and high-speed interconnects.
og_description: Microsoft Azure HB368-48rs_v5 is an x86_64 server with 48 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 448.0 GB of RAM, and 15851 GB of local storage, featuring RDMA capabilities for memory-intensive and database workloads.

tagline: An Intel-powered, RDMA-capable server featuring 448 GB of memory and 15.8 TB of local storage for memory-intensive workloads.
